littlejoys.configuration.digSpots.afterD: The seconds that must pass after digging a dig spot before another dig spot can appear for a player.
littlejoys.configuration.digSpots.minimu: The minimum distance between dig spots, preventing them from spawning too close together.
littlejoys.configuration.digSpots.projec: The offset applied to the spawn area in the direction the player is facing. Set to 0 to center it around the player.
littlejoys.configuration.digSpots.spawnD: The distance dig spots will spawn from the player.
littlejoys.configuration.digSpots.spawnI: The seconds that must pass after a dig spot appeared before another dig spot can appear for a player.
littlejoys.configuration.digSpots.totalL: The limit of dig spots that can spawn in a given chunk overall. Once this many dig spots have spawned, the chunk will never spawn any again. Set to -1 to disable.
littlejoys.configuration.fishingSpots.af: The seconds that must pass after fishing a fishing spot before another fishing spot can appear for a player.
littlejoys.configuration.fishingSpots.fi: The maximum distance a bobber can be from a fishing spot to still trigger it.
littlejoys.configuration.fishingSpots.mi: The minimum distance between fishing spots, preventing them from spawning too close together.
littlejoys.configuration.fishingSpots.pr: The offset applied to the spawn area in the direction the player is facing. Set to 0 to center it around the player.
littlejoys.configuration.fishingSpots.se: Fishing spots will lure fish quicker than regular water. Set to -1 to disable.
littlejoys.configuration.fishingSpots.sp: The distance fishing spots will spawn from the player.
The seconds that must pass after a fishing spot appeared before another fishing spot can appear for a player.
littlejoys.configuration.fishingSpots.to: The limit of fishing spots that can spawn in a given chunk overall. Once this many fishing spots have spawned, the chunk will never spawn any again. Set to -1 to disable.
Fishing Spot Golden Chest Chance Bonus
The golden chest chance bonus applied when fishing at a fishing spot.
Fishing Spot Treasure Chest Chance Bonus
The treasure chest chance bonus applied when fishing at a fishing spot.
If enabled, Little Joy's own fishing spot rewards will be skipped when Stardew Fishing minigames take over.
